name: @forge-dev/mod-qa
description: E2E, unit, visual, security, and load testing

actions.label: Detect Test Runner
actions.command: [ -f vitest.config.ts ] && echo 'vitest' || ([ -f jest.config.js ] && echo 'jest' || ([ -f pytest.ini ] && echo 'pytest' || echo 'none'))

actions.label: Run Unit Tests
actions.command: npx vitest run 2>&1 || pytest 2>&1 || echo 'No test runner found'

actions.label: Run E2E
actions.command: npx playwright test 2>&1 || echo 'Playwright not installed'

actions.label: Security Scan
actions.command: npx semgrep scan --config auto 2>&1 || echo 'Semgrep not installed'

actions.label: Load Test
actions.command: k6 run load-test.js 2>&1 || echo 'k6 not installed or no load-test.js found'

actions.label: Visual Regression
actions.command: npx lost-pixel 2>&1 || echo 'Lost Pixel not installed'

actions.label: Full Suite
actions.command: echo '=== Unit Tests ===' && (npx vitest run 2>&1 || echo 'skipped') && echo '=== E2E ===' && (npx playwright test 2>&1 || echo 'skipped') && echo '=== Security ===' && (npx semgrep scan --config auto 2>&1 || echo 'skipped')

actions.label: List Reports
actions.command: ls -1t coverage/ test-results/ playwright-report/ 2>/dev/null | head -20 || echo ''

detectors.suggestion: Vitest detected. Run unit tests from the QA module.
Playwright detected. Run E2E tests from QA.
Semgrep rules found. Run security scans from QA.
k6 scripts found. Run load tests from QA.
